overview: Conception Clinic is a reproductive health and fertility guidance platform offering evidence-informed preconception care and family planning support. It combines an educational content library, a personalized self-assessment questionnaire with risk profiling, consultation booking, and authenticated user dashboards for individuals and couples planning pregnancy.
features: User registration and login with protected dashboard
Educational article library on nutrition, lifestyle, reproductive testing and more
Multi-step fertility assessment with personalized risk profile and recommendations
Responsive layout for mobile and desktop
User profile to save assessment history and preferences
